title: Disc Delight
description: Disc Delight adds new music disc to the game!
body: Disc Delight is a captivating Minecraft mod that adds a diverse collection of unique music discs to enhance your gameplay experience. Immerse yourself in the world of sound with plenty new tracks, each bringing a distinct vibe and atmosphere to your adventures. Discover these discs hidden in various structures like desert temples, abandoned mineshafts, and dungeons, adding an exciting treasure hunt element to your explorations. Whether you're building, exploring, or just enjoying the game, Disc Delight ensures every moment is accompanied by enchanting melodies. Join the musical journey today!
